title: AN ACT REAPPROPRIATING CERTAIN SUMS APPROPRIATED IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINETEEN HUNDRED.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4591 / 58 OG No. 15, 3100 (April 9, 1962)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3294, June 18, 1961 ]

AN ACT REAPPROPRIATING CERTAIN SUMS APPROPRIATED IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINETEEN HUNDRED.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sums appropriated in items (g) and (af), pages 119 and 121, respectively, subparagraph 70 for the City of Manila, paragraph "a," Title B, Section one of Republic Act Numbered Nineteen hundred, to wit:

"(g)

Marques de Comillas (NaC) Street, from Oregon to Isaac Peral and around Paco CemeteryImprovement and paving

P25,000.00

"(af)

Esguerra Street , Agua-Marina Section,San Andres Subdivision

15,000.00

and the sums appropriated in items (e) and (g) page 323 and item (j), page 324, all under Group IV, sub-paragraph (29) for the City of Manila, paragraph "f," Section two of the same Act, to wit:

"(e) Sases Puericulture Center General improvement

P10,000.00

"(g)

Waiting Shed in Herran and Calderon Streets, Sta. Ana Construction

10,000.00

" (j) Jose Rizal Monument , De la Peña Paco Construction

10,000.00"

totalling seventy thousand pesos, are hereby reappropriated, for the following purposes:

(1) Social Welfare Administration BuildÂ ing , Kansas St. , Malate Construction

53,000.00

(2) Arellano Streetâfrom Diamante to Esguerra Ext., and Diamante Streetâfrom Pasig Line to AreÂ llano Improvement

17,000.00

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted, without Executive approval, June 18, 1961.
